'''鈭歾h-r-v''' ('''kazharav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:javelin|javelin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:javelin|javelin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-r-v
|-
! Lemma
| kazharav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizharav|thizharav]] || [[word:jizharav|jizharav]] || [[word:shizharav|shizharav]] || [[word:kizharav|kizharav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzharav|thuthuzharav]] || [[word:jujuzharav|jujuzharav]] || [[word:shushuzharav|shushuzharav]] || [[word:kukuzharav|kukuzharav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzharav|thuzharav]] || [[word:juzharav|juzharav]] || [[word:shuzharav|shuzharav]] || [[word:kuzharav|kuzharav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzharav|thuzharav]] || [[word:juzharav|juzharav]] || [[word:shuzharav|shuzharav]] || [[word:kuzharav|kuzharav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezharav|thezharav]] || [[word:jezharav|jezharav]] || [[word:shezharav|shezharav]] || [[word:kezharav|kezharav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozharav|thothozharav]] || [[word:jojozharav|jojozharav]] || [[word:shoshozharav|shoshozharav]] || [[word:kokozharav|kokozharav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozharav|thozharav]] || [[word:jozharav|jozharav]] || [[word:shozharav|shozharav]] || [[word:kozharav|kozharav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozharav|thozharav]] || [[word:jozharav|jozharav]] || [[word:shozharav|shozharav]] || [[word:kozharav|kozharav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zharav|th忙zharav]] || [[word:j忙zharav|j忙zharav]] || [[word:sh忙zharav|sh忙zharav]] || [[word:k忙zharav|k忙zharav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazharav|thathazharav]] || [[word:jajazharav|jajazharav]] || [[word:shashazharav|shashazharav]] || [[word:kakazharav|kakazharav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazharav|thazharav]] || [[word:jazharav|jazharav]] || [[word:shazharav|shazharav]] || [[word:kazharav|kazharav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazharav|thazharav]] || [[word:jazharav|jazharav]] || [[word:shazharav|shazharav]] || [[word:kazharav|kazharav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazharav|shazharav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazharav|goshazharav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazharav|gokishazharav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazharavn眉|shazharavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazharavnkn眉|goshazharavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharavn眉|gokishazharavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazharavsh毛|shazharavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazharavnksh毛|goshazharavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazharavsh毛|gokishazharavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharavro|shazharavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharavnkro|goshazharavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharavro|gokishazharavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharavmu|shazharavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharavnkmu|goshazharavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharavmu|gokishazharavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazharavsher|shazharavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazharavnksher|goshazharavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazharavsher|gokishazharavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazharavng|shazharavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazharavnkng|goshazharavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazharavng|gokishazharavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazharavya|shazharavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazharavnkya|goshazharavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazharavya|gokishazharavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazharavyam|shazharavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazharavnkyam|goshazharavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazharavyam|gokishazharavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazharavn眉sh毛|shazharavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazharavnkn眉sh毛|goshazharavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazharavn眉sh毛|gokishazharavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharavn眉ro|shazharavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharavnkn眉ro|goshazharavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharavn眉ro|gokishazharavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharavn眉mu|shazharavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharavnkn眉mu|goshazharavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharavn眉mu|gokishazharavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazharavsh毛n眉|shazharavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazharavnksh毛n眉|goshazharavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharavsh毛n眉|gokishazharavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharavsh毛ro|shazharavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharavnksh毛ro|goshazharavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharavsh毛ro|gokishazharavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharavsh毛mu|shazharavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharavnksh毛mu|goshazharavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharavsh毛mu|gokishazharavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazharavron眉|shazharavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazharavnkron眉|goshazharavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharavron眉|gokishazharavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazharavrosh毛|shazharavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazharavnkrosh毛|goshazharavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazharavrosh毛|gokishazharavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharavromu|shazharavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharavnkromu|goshazharavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharavromu|gokishazharavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazharavmun眉|shazharavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazharavnkmun眉|goshazharavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharavmun眉|gokishazharavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazharavmush毛|shazharavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazharavnkmush毛|goshazharavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazharavmush毛|gokishazharavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharavmuro|shazharavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharavnkmuro|goshazharavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharavmuro|gokishazharavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
